гЂЂгЂЂLonely college student Alex encounters his favorite filmmaker JP Smith hanging out in his sleepy upstate NY town. The two foster an unlikely friendship, with JP using Alex as the star of his next project. Eager to have his filmmaking idol in his life, Alex unwittingly opens himself up to JP's direction and manipulation, turning his life into utter chaos in the process.
introduction: Lonely college student Alex encounters his favorite filmmaker JP Smith hanging out in his sleepy upstate NY town. The two foster an unlikely friendship, with JP using Alex as the star of his next project. Eager to have his filmmaking idol in his life, Alex unwittingly opens himself up to JP's direction and manipulation, turning his life into utter chaos in the process.
